signals.title: Contribution splits shipped blind
signals.detail: WFM2-666 merged (PR 600) with no PostHog events. WFM2-667 (Edit modal) still In Review. You will not be able to measure admin adoption of contribution splits or detect if the form is broken.

signals.title: Dev Copy tickets are duplicating in-review work
signals.detail: WFM2-718 and WFM2-722 are 'Dev Copy' items that mirror WFM2-662 and WFM2-664, which are also In Review. This pattern inflates the issue count and hides actual completion rate. Consider consolidating.

signals.title: MFA shipping without regression test
signals.detail: PAY-1287 (MFA QA regression test) is Todo with no assignee. Three MFA feature tickets are In Progress and nearly done. Shipping MFA without a regression test is high risk — auth flow breakage affects all WSE logins. Assign PAY-1287 immediately.

signals.title: Henrique carrying MFA + Tokenization simultaneously
signals.detail: PAY-1088/1089/1090 (MFA) and PAY-1192/1193/1195 (Tokenization) are all assigned to henriquev and all Todo/In Progress. MFA needs to close before tokenization starts — these are competing auth surface changes.

signals.title: GTN deployment to PROD has zero PostHog observability
signals.detail: FNM2-983 is deploying GTN Acceleration to PROD this week. There are no PostHog events for GTN mapping, recon approval, or pay group processing. If something breaks in PROD, you will find out from a customer complaint, not Atom. Add gtn_mapping_triggered and gtn_recon_approved before PROD rollout.
